content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 curiosity-driven active learning agents can leverage Transformer attention for episodic memory to dynamically prioritize which novel unexplored trajectories to store, rather than saving every curiosity-triggered interaction that leads to memory bloat. Attention scores from Transformer episodic memory can double as a confidence metric for active learning uncertainty, eliminating the need for separate curiosity calculation and uncertainty estimation heads.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
